# suicide_guardian_16MB.csv - GUARDIAN v: # docs/SPEC.md sec 3.3 / sec 1 (GUARDIAN). A tiny `factory` Guardian app gates first on cold boot
# hands off to an UNMODIFIED Marauder in `ota_0`. To re-assert the gate
# `otadata` or calls set_boot_partition(factory) (which itself just formats otadata - verified in
# esp_ota_ops.c). Enable CONFIG_BOOTLOADER_APP_ROLLBACK_ENABLE so a Marauder that never marks
# itself valid auto-reverts to the Guardian factory app.
# Does NOT fit in 4 MB: two large apps (Guardian factory + ~1.875 MB Marauder) plus filesystems
# (S3/C3); partition table @0x8000. App offsets 64 KB (0x10000) aligned; data 4 KB aligned.
#   nvs       Marauder's own NVS (kept separate from gate state)
#   otadata   bootloader's OTA-select sectors (blank => boot factory/Guardian)
#   factory   the Guardian gate app (1 MB; the gate is small
#   ota_0     unmodified Marauder app (2 MB; >= its ~1.875 MB min_spiffs slot)

16 MB flash (0x1000000): namespaces sgate/sgate_rt) - NEVER renamed; host keys off it

# suicide_guardian_16MB.csv - GUARDIAN v: #   scratch   SAFE_MODE dry-run erase target (subtype 0x40) - REQUIRED for SUICIDE_SAFE_MODE builds
# `scratch` (data 0x40) is REQUIRED for SUICIDE_SAFE_MODE: the firmware refuses to simulate a wipe
# (zero erases) if no `scratch` partition exists and NEVER falls back to a live partition
# (docs/SPEC.md sec 3/sec 5/sec 8). Reclaimed by shrinking spiffs 0x10000; still fills 16 MB exactly.
